claimComponent: receipt-stable replay evidence with explicit limitations
rivalTheory: simple baseline or selection effect explains the observation
expectedObservation: A rival theory explains at least one observation more simply than the candidate.
expectedBaselineResult: rival baseline matches or beats candidate
falsifier: Fresh holdout in Computational materials public descriptor data matches the rival baseline or produces no nontrivial separation.
noEditRule: Frozen before execution; post-hoc prediction edits invalidate readiness scoring.
